title: Fluroscent Microscopy Setup
desc: The Olympus SZX16 stereo microscope setup is optimized for studying the collective dynamics of C. elegans in two-dimensional environments. Its wide field of view and high numerical aperture enable simultaneous monitoring of spatiotemporal patterns across large nematode populations. To facilitate high-throughput tracking, the high-contrast fluorescence axis (powered by the YODN source and RFP2 filter) isolates the flexible, moving organisms from the background.

title: Magneto-optical Study Setup
desc: This experimental setup is designed for magneto-optical studies of liquid crystals, allowing for the precise control of magnetic fields and temperature. It features a customized Holmarc HO-EM7000S electromagnet that applies controlled magnetic fields to the liquid crystal sample. A Julabo Dyneo DD-800F temperature controller accurately regulates the sample's temperature to trigger specific phase transitions.

title: Polarization Microscopy Setup
desc: 'Leica DM4P Polarization Microscope' with all optical accessories and 'Linkam T96 S Temperature controller' for precise temperature control.

title: Optical Studies Setup
desc: Optical studies setup with 'Ametek TMC Vibration Controlled Optical Table' to make setups for custom optical studies.

title: Cell Fabrication Facility
desc: Setup for cell custom cell fabriation.
